title: UIC marks Arbor Day by releasing beneficial insects
summary_en: Arbor Day event protects UIC’s trees and highlights the university’s commitment to sustainability.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校以释放益虫方式纪念植树节

title: UIC students create wearable tech for children with anxiety
summary_en: The project was one of 200 presented at the Engineering Expo 2026.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校学生研发面向焦虑儿童的可穿戴干预技术

title: UIC researchers awarded $10M grant to boost young learners’ reading skills
summary_en: Funds launch WORDS Illinois, a multiyear professional learning program for teachers.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校研究人员获1000万美元拨款 助力提升低龄学习者阅读技能

title: UIC historian  receives national service award
summary_en: Professor Barbara Ransby honored by the Organization of American Historians.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校历史学家获美国历史学家组织全国性服务奖项
